channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cuddling cats may increase stress levels, study suggests
item.description: Researchers in the Netherlands have moved closer to settling the cats-versus-dogs debate by examining how pet interactions affect stress.

item.title: Utah's stricter 0.05 BAC limit significantly reduces drunk driving fatalities, analysis finds
item.description: A new analysis shows that Utah's reduction of the legal BAC limit from 0.08 to 0.05 g/dL led to a notable drop in alcohol-related traffic deaths.

item.title: Wearable Diabetes Devices: Triggers Behind Most Dermatitis
item.description: A patch-testing study identifies the main compounds causing contact dermatitis from insulin pumps and glucose monitors.

item.title: Nipocalimab Outshines Placebo in Phase 2b Lupus Study
item.description: A higher percentage of participants receiving nipocalimab 15 mg/kg achieved the primary endpoint of an SLE Responder Index-4 response at week 24.
